expect: SPACES GET CREATED — one per leg (Cairo, the safari/Ngorongoro leg, Zanzibar, Dar es Salaam), each with its own agent, not one generic space
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

contacts.name: Richard
contacts.notes: Primary safari contact. Pay balance ($960) on arrival. Also ask about extra ranger tip.

contacts.name: Emmanuel
contacts.notes: Driver-guide for crater day (not Richard). Mentioned extra ranger tip ~TSH 5,000 cash at gate.

contacts.name: Suricata Safaris Ltd
contacts.notes: 3-day group camping safari Aug 7-9. Pesapal: payments.pesapal.com/suricatasafaris (+5%).

contacts.name: Eileen Hotel Cairo
contacts.notes: 21 Youssef El-Gendy St, Abdeen, Downtown Cairo. Near Tahrir Square.

costs.item: Suricata Safaris package, 3-day group camping safari, 2 pax
Suricata balance due on arrival (cash, post-2009 USD notes)
The Rock Restaurant dinner, Zanzibar, Aug 15 (paid)
Zanzibar local driving permit (per driver, ~3mo validity)
Zanzibar mandatory travel insurance, ZIC (2 travelers x $44)
Ngorongoro Conservation Area entry permit (2 pax x $70.80, 1 day)
Ngorongoro crater service fee (2 pax x $70.80)
Ngorongoro crater vehicle descent fee (per vehicle/trip)
Tarangire NP entrance (2 pax x $59, peak season)
Lake Manyara NP entrance (2 pax x $59, peak season)

legs.leg: Safari circuit - Tarangire / Lake Manyara / Ngorongoro Crater
legs.lodging: Suricata Safaris (Twiga camps + Jevas Hotel, package)

memos.title: Crater Day — Driver-Guide Emmanuel
memos.body: Crater day with driver-guide Emmanuel (not Richard). He is the safari driver-guide for the Ngorongoro Crater day.

memos.title: Maasai Bracelets for Athena Mari
memos.body: Bought two Maasai beaded bracelets for Athena Mari — roughly $25 for both, paid in shillings (~TSH 35,000).

memos.title: Extra Ranger Tip at Gate
memos.body: Emmanuel mentioned an extra ranger tip expected at the gate — about TSH 5,000, cash, separate from park fees. Need to ask Richard about this before the safari balance payment.

memos.title: Stone Town Photo
memos.body: The photo looks up into a narrow courtyard framed by tall white buildings with dark wooden balconies and arched windows. The ornate carved balcony railings and repeated arches give it a distinctly historic Stone Town feel, with bright blue sky above. No specific landmark sign is visible, but the architecture itself is the standout feature.

memos.title: Open Question — Ask Richard
memos.body: Ask Richard about the extra ranger tip (~TSH 5,000) before paying the safari balance. Is it included or separate?

park_fees.notes: Section E: Crater Service Fee — Non-EA Citizens

schema.title: Contacts
schema.description: Trip contacts — safari, accommodations, dining, and park authorities.

schema.title: Trip Costs
schema.description: All trip costs — flights in EUR, everything else in USD.

category.description: flights | safari | dining | transport | visa | insurance | park fees | lodging

schema.title: Trip Legs
schema.description: One row per stay/segment of the Tanzania trip.

schema.title: Memos & Notes
schema.description: Voice memo facts, photo descriptions, and open questions from the trip.

schema.title: Park Fees — Ngorongoro Conservation Area Tariffs
schema.description: Tariff data from NCAA official document. Non-East African citizen rates.

category.description: Fee category (Entry Permit, Crater Service, Camping, etc.)

per.description: Per what (person per day, vehicle per trip, etc.)
